Click/tap to place gravity anchors
MODE: SHIELD SHIELD: solar aura resistance ↑ cold risk ↑ FOCUS READY

Sun contact is fatal. Auras drain health. Click to place anchors. Signal limits anchors. Space / FOCUS = slow time. P = LOW FX.

quick survival lesson

THIS IS YOUR WORLD

Keep it alive.

orbital pause

PAUSED

portal to the next vibe jam game

Sun contact is always fatal. Auras drain health over time. Click to place anchors. Space / FOCUS slows time. 1 Shield, 2 Sleep, 3 Observe. M mute. P LOW FX.

civilization report

THE DAWN ENDED

portal to the next vibe jam game

field guide

HOW TO PLAY

Your goal: keep the last living world alive as long as possible.

  • Click or tap to place gravity anchors.
  • Anchors cost Signal. Signal regenerates during stable orbits.
  • Space / FOCUS slows time briefly — use it to escape danger.
  • Survival Mode — endless run. Survive as many days as possible.
  • Level Mode — reach day milestones to climb from First Dawn to Last World Keeper.
  • Comets — rare fast impacts with a warning omen. They hurt badly and shove your orbit.
  • 1 Shield — protects from red heat aura. Not from direct contact.
  • 2 Sleep — protects from blue cold aura and restores Signal faster.
  • 3 Observe — protects from yellow/gamma chaos aura, gives clearer omens, and cheaper anchors.
  • Direct sun contact is fatal. Aura zones drain health over time.

Modes reduce aura danger. They do not stop direct sun contact.

portal to the next vibe jam game

origin record

THE LAST ORBIT

In a system where dawn has no pattern, one living world remains.

Three suns rule the sky. Alpha burns like a tyrant. Beta vanishes into cold silence. Gamma bends gravity until truth becomes rumor.

Your civilization no longer asks to be saved forever. It asks for one more day.

Place anchors. Read omens. Slow time. Choose how the world endures.

The universe is not evil. It is only unstable.

The portal leads to the next Vibe Jam world.

portal to the next vibe jam game
